name: Recipefork Presentation Display
description: Recipe detail presentation block for Recipefork showing numbered plating steps, optional step imagery, and whether the plating guide was AI-generated or author-guided.

numbered-steps.description: Presentation card inserted after recipe instructions, with clear numbering, optional imagery, and an AI/manual provenance badge.

slots.presentation-step: Single plating step row with numbered marker and optional image

visual_brief: This should feel like a refined serving guide rather than another cooking block. It belongs after the cooking instructions and before the story, acting as the bridge between technique and presentation.
